name: nika
description: Nika · the workflow language for AI. Author AI workflows as checkable .nika.yaml files.

plugins.name: nika
plugins.description: The nika-authoring skill (author → check → repair loop) + the read-only Nika MCP oracle (8 tools: check · explain · schema · examples · template · canon · catalog · tools). Requires the nika binary: brew install supernovae-st/tap/nika
